zh.Molsberg, Westerwaldkreis, Rhineland-Pal: 德國海藍-普法爾茲維斯特瓦爾德可萊斯莫爾斯波格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aleidis van Arenberg於大約1225年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲維斯特瓦爾德可萊斯莫爾斯波格時，她的父親Heinrich III. von Arenberg31歲，母親Mechtild von Neuenahr27歲。她與Jan van Heusden結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1303年在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾享年79歲。

zh-hans.Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾
zh-hans.Molsberg, Westerwaldkreis, Rhineland-Pal: 德国海藍-普法爾茲維斯特瓦爾德可萊斯莫爾斯波格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aleidis van Arenberg于大约1225年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲維斯特瓦爾德可萊斯莫爾斯波格时，她的父亲Heinrich III. von Arenberg31岁，母亲Mechtild von Neuenahr27岁。她与Jan van Heusden结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1303年在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Arenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name composed of the personal name A(a)ron + German Berg ‘mountain’.

en.lifeSummary: When Aleidis van Arenberg was born about 1225, in Molsberg, Westerwaldkreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Heinrich III. von Arenberg, was 31 and her mother, Mechtild von Neuenahr, was 27. She married Jan van Heusden. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1303, in Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aleidis van Arenberg est née environ 1225, à Molsberg, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich III. von Arenberg, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mechtild von Neuenahr, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Jan van Heusden. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1303, à Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aleidis van Arenberg um 1225 in Molsberg, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich III. von Arenberg 31 und ihre Mutter Mechtild von Neuenahr 27. Sie hat Jan van Heusden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1303 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aleidis van Arenberg è nata il circa 1225 nel Molsberg, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Heinrich III. von Arenberg, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mechtild von Neuenahr, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Jan van Heusden. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1303, nel Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Arenbergが約1225年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズウエステルワルドクレイスモルスバーグで生まれた時，父Heinrich III. von Arenbergは31歳，母Mechtild von Neuenahrは27歳であった。Jan van Heusdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1303年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクoルンで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aleidis van Arenberg(이)가 대략 1225년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 웨스터월드크레이스 모스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich III. von Arenberg(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mechtild von Neuenahr(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Jan van Heusden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1303년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 ko에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands: Heusden, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aleidis van Arenberg nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Molsberg, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich III. von Arenberg, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mechtild von Neuenahr, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan van Heusden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1303, em Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aleidis van Arenberg родилась около 1225 г. в местности молсбирг, вестирвалдкрис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Heinrich III. von Arenberg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mechtild von Neuenahr, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan van Heusden. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1303 г. в местности кoлн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands: Heusden, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aleidis van Arenberg nació aproximadamente 1225, en Molsberg, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich III. von Arenberg, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mechtild von Neuenahr, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Jan van Heusden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1303, en Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 79 años.
